title: portulaca poliosperma var. tristigmatata
intro: Portulaca poliosperma var. tristigmatata, also known as the "Bladder Purslane," is a variety of Portulaca poliosperma, a flowering plant species in the Portulacaceae family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help to reduce inflammation and protect against cell damage. The health benefits of Portulaca poliosperma var. tristigmatata include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce cholesterol levels, and alleviate symptoms of gastrointestinal disorders. In herbal preparations, the plant can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to support digestive health and reduce inflammation in the body.
